description: The Alpine A110, relaunched in 2017, revives the lightweight mid-engined sports car philosophy of its 1960s predecessor. With a turbocharged 1.8-litre four-cylinder producing up to 300 bhp in S trim and weighing just 1,098 kg, it prioritises driving purity over outright power. The limited-run R and GT versions are the most sought-after.
